note: Canonical golden DatHost cs2_settings for the DGLS match server (id 6824c4d10bf4444f5817d188). Provisioning PUTs these (dotted, e.g. `cs2_settings.game_mode`) to /game-servers/{id} BEFORE start, to overwrite any recreational-mode drift made in the panel between matches. `game_mode: competitive` is intentional for this season — a 'competitive-style wingman' hybrid (for xplay consistency), with the wingman-specific rules (round count, warmup, overtime, economy) layered on top via cfg/gamemode_competitive2v2_server.cfg and cfg/MatchZy/live_override.cfg. Secrets (rcon, passwords, FTP/MySQL, GSLT) are intentionally omitted — never commit them. Captured live 2026-07-03.

per_match_overrides.note: Map selection is set at provision time, per match — NOT part of the static golden baseline (src/lib/dathost.ts excludes these keys from the static PUT and sets them separately in applyGoldenSettings). `workshop_collection` mode does not behave reliably on this server — confirmed live — so every provision requires a resolved single map; applyGoldenSettings throws rather than falling back to it.
per_match_overrides.cs2_settings.workshop_single_map_id: <the picked map's Steam workshop id, extracted from maps.workshop_url>
